name: MSI PRO B850-P WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x16 - Support DDR5-8200(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 10Gbps Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 5Gb LAN - 802.11be 2x2 Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4 (PROB850PWIFI)
shortName: MSI PRO B850-P WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16
description: MSI PRO B850 ATX motherboard with AM5 socket, PCIe 5.0, and Wi-Fi 7 for professional-grade AMD systems.
